headline: Lennar’s (LEN) Q2 Results Show Margin Improvement and Strong Order Activity
summary: Lennar Corporation (NYSE:LEN) is included among the 10 Best Value Dividend Stocks to Buy Now According to Warren Buffett. Lennar Corporation (NYSE:LEN) reported its earnings on June 12. During the company’s Q2 2026 earnings call, Executive Chairman, CEO, and President Stuart Miller said Lennar delivered 20,519 homes during the quarter. It landed near the midpoint […]
